ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: BEGINS(NATT_Quote_Recordtype_Dev_Name__c, "NATT_Units_Quote") && ISPICKVAL(SBQQ__Quote__r.SBQQ__Type__c, "Amendment") && SBQQ__EffectiveQuantity__c > 0 && NATT_Is_Base_Unit__c = TRUE && NATT_Locked__c = TRUE
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The quantity of the locked unit may not be changed. To add more units, clone the bundle and update the quantity.
